review_title: Easy-to-use platform for collecting and organizing applicant data
description: Overall, my experience with Jotform has been very positive. It has made it easy to create structured internship and recruiting application workflows and helped us centralize candidate information in a consistent way while our organization continues to grow. The platform is intuitive, flexible, and quick to implement, which allowed us to improve our intake process without needing a full ATS in place yet. It’s been a practical and scalable solution for building an early-stage talent pipeline and supporting more organized internal processes
author: Jennifer N.
pros: What I like most about Jotform is how easy it is to quickly build structured application forms for internships and recruiting workflows without needing technical support. The drag-and-drop builder makes customization simple, and conditional logic allows us to tailor forms for different candidate groups. It has helped us centralize applicant information and create an organized pipeline before implementing a full ATS, which saves time and improves visibility across the team.
cons: As our usage grows, managing larger numbers of forms and keeping reporting centralized across workflows can take some additional organization. Some integrations and automation features also require a bit of setup time initially. However, these are minor compared to the flexibility and efficiency the platform provides overall.

review_title: A Great Solution for Growing Nonprofits
description: Jotform has been a total game-changer for our nonprofit. We were struggling with outdated mail-in membership applications until we found this platform, which was the only truly free program that could handle every complex requirement we had. Since making the switch, our membership has actually increased because the digital process is so much faster and more accessible for everyone. The setup was incredibly intuitive for me as the creator; I especially love the conditional logic that hides unnecessary questions, making the forms feel much less daunting for our applicants. We were also able to use our own logo and custom colors to ensure everything looks modern and matches our website perfectly. Between the professional design and the fact that it automatically organizes all our data into a spreadsheet, Jotform has saved us countless hours of manual work. It’s the perfect, budget-friendly solution for any organization looking to scale!
author: Mikayla L.
pros: Jotform provided our nonprofit with a professional, custom-branded digital solution that replaced our manual mail-in process and successfully increased our membership. Its intuitive conditional logic and automatic spreadsheet organization made complex forms simple for both our team to create and our members to complete—all on a truly functional free plan.
cons: I could not connect our PayPal account because it had to be a PayPal business account. Our account is a nonprofit account, and I couldn't change it, so I wasn't able to integrate payment in the form. Our customers are still having to pay their membership fee in a two-step process as they were before we used Jotform. While I liked the conditional logic and found it fairly simple to set up myself, it would have been better if AI could have helped me out with setting up more of those conditions. I would tell it what I needed it to do, it would tell me the condition was set, but then I would preview the form, the condition did not work, so I had to do them manually.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Long time Jotform User
description: Overall, I have had a postive experience, and use Jotform daily. It takes form management to an efficient and easy to use part of gathering important information.
author: Sandra R.
pros: The ability for form customization is highly important to me, as well as ease of use. The price point is quite good, especially if you have a large number of forms. Customer support continues to improve and get faster.
cons: Not being able to have multiple people access Jotform admin is a significant drawback. It limits organizations and creates a bottleneck in team flow, as only one person has the ability to edit and revise forms, unless you use a work around. The Enterprise level is significantly more expensive, which would be the solution to this, however it's priced out of range for most teams. Support can be complex, as on occasion they do not read through the full request or read what has been attempted to solve an issue.

review_title: Easy to use, great value for money
description: Overall, I'm thrilled that I was able to go from paper applications to an online platform that tracks applicants.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The user interface is superior to similar platforms and I love how easy it is to make continuous changes to the live form created.
cons: No UNDO button when editing / creating form! It's extremely easy to delete or alter aspects of the form by mistake, but there is no option to undo any action.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the best form builders I've used
description: My overall experience with Jotform has been really positive. I started using it to collect responses for a few internal projects and ended up adopting it more broadly. The interactive widgets like ranking and rating scales make forms feel less tedious for people filling them out, which genuinely improves response quality. Setup is fast, the interface doesn't overwhelm you, and it just gets out of your way and lets you build. Would recommend it to anyone who needs to build forms quickly without a steep learning curve.
author: Venkata M.
pros: Honestly, what won me over with Jotform is how interactive the forms can be. The ranking widget is way better than any alternative I used. The drag-and-drop builder is super intuitive and I was able to get forms up and running without any help. The number of templates available is impressive and the third-party integrations just work. Overall it's made data collection a lot more fun and efficient for me.
cons: The main thing I'd flag is that the free plan fills up quicker than you'd expect if you're running multiple forms. It would be nice to have slightly more generous submission limits before needing to upgrade. Occasionally the builder feels a tiny bit sluggish on very complex forms, but honestly it's a minor thing and hasn't really gotten in my way.

review_title: Easy to use
description: Jotform is super easy to use and perfect for creating professional forms quickly. It’s been a huge help for managing inquiries and bookings. The only downside is the limited free plan, but overall it’s reliable and worth it.
author: Jamilla M.
pros: Jotform is very easy to use and perfect for creating professional forms without any technical skills. The drag and drop builder, wide range of templates, and features like payment integration and e signatures make it a powerful tool. It helps keep client information organized and streamlines bookings and inquiries, saving a lot of time.
cons: Jotform isn’t perfect. The free plan feels very limited, so you’ll likely have to upgrade sooner than expected. Pricing can get expensive as you grow, especially if you rely on it for bookings or client workflows. The design options are okay, but not the most modern or customizable if you care about aesthetics. I’ve also noticed it can be a bit slow or glitchy at times, especially with more detailed forms. It’s still a solid tool, but these small issues can add up depending on how much you use it.

review_title: Easy, Professional, and a Huge Time Saver!
description: Overall, my experience with Jotform has been great. It has helped streamline my business processes, especially for bookings, client forms, and payments. It’s reliable, professional, and makes my business look more organized. I would definitely recommend it to anyone needing an easy and effective form builder.
author: Shantoria H.
pros: Jotform is extremely easy to use and makes creating professional forms simple, even without tech experience. I love the customization options, templates, and how quickly I can build forms for my business. The ability to collect payments, manage client information, and automate responses has saved me so much time. It’s perfect for keeping everything organized in one place.
cons: Some of the advanced features can be a little confusing at first, and pricing can get a bit high if you need more submissions or storage. Also, customization on mobile isn’t always as smooth as desktop.

review_title: Jotform- Better than the competition
description: I have a good overall experience using jotform. I did try to create accounts with some jotforms competitors but for the cost value/ease of use and ability to design the questionnaire how I want, and store a certain number of responses, Jotform is the winner.
author: Teresa E.
pros: I like the ease of setting up a questionnaire which I use for my law firm to collect info for clients. The form can be edited easily and I can design the questions using tables or write in responses etc.
cons: I deleted a question and it still seems to show up when people answer the questionnaire. When I go back into edit the form, the form appears correct, but when I receive responses, the deleted question is there?

review_title: Jotforms Survey
description: Well, its good to use this form on our events as it is user friendly and have good background and tiles.
author: Rosemarie L.
pros: Its user friendly and the background or design is good. Internet connection is also good as we can easily download it.
cons: Its expensive to subscribe premium and also its better if we can use more storage to use for data. I never tried customer support so if its possible make a chat customer support.

review_title: great platform with so much versatility
description: Brilliant, will continue to use and find uses. I have made signing forms, collecting certification data, waivers and also use it to store and access SOPS
author: Nicola J.
pros: I love this platform. I can customise my forms, make apps for my employees and improve their workflow and access to documents they need day to day.
cons: it takes a wee bit of patience to load and login to your apps first time, and needs a double confirmation. Once you get past that it is good to go

review_title: Extremely User Friendly and Ideal Form Builder Tool.
description: Overall Jotform offer an easiest way to build a form and also has highly customizable features. Ability to create and publish forms from any device is a huge plus.
author: Brock G.
pros: One of the most standout features of Jotform is it's drag and drop tool which makes it easy to create and customize forms without any coding knowledge. Easy to collect and edit data.Have customizable themes for branding purposes.Simple to create and publish form from any device.
cons: Sometimes the upload in Jotform does not translate well into new from ,needs one to do some creative work to readjust titles or sections that didn't copy smoothly to it.

review_title: Great Tool for any Job
description: Over all, I use JotForm on a daily bases. It is extremely helpful in all areas of my work and has become a very important tool.
author: Chantel L.
pros: You don’t need any coding knowledge. The form builder is very visual, so you can simply drag fields where you want them, rearrange them, and see your form take shape instantly.
cons: Certain field types like Input Tables, Matrixes, or Widgets don’t support pre-population across forms. This makes it hard to pass structured data from one form to another seamlessly.

review_title: Jotform Ease and Peace of Mind
description: Impeccable. We are delighted with the forms, the ease to create new forms, to download the data and to make adjustments to customize.
author: Kim W.
pros: We love the Jotform integration with MonkeyPod for our enrollment, registration and all things being user friendly for our community. We are able to customize the forms, easily manage the documents and the data collection is seamless.
cons: A bit pricey but worth the clarity and data collection. We thought it was included with MonkeyPod but found we need a higher subscription for all the features we want.

review_title: 10/10 Recommend Jotform
description: I have been using Jotform for years and have had an amazing experience. Always recommend it as my go to information collection modality.
author: Sophia V.
pros: I use JotForm to power two of my businesses. The most helpful feature is being able to collect information + payments all in one place.
cons: Having to hide certain forms when I only want to present one price to a client and not all of my prices.

review_title: A great form and so much more
description: We've been using Jotform for about 4 years now and it has made summer camp registrations seemless for parents filling out the form. It makes reviewing registrations simple also on the backend. With integrations we can move data around without much effort.
author: Josh B.
pros: Jotform has both the power for complex forms, but also the ability to make it look good to both sides of the data-from those filling things out to those reviewing the data later. The cost is also in the sweet spot making it a great value.
cons: Without the enterprise level you can't have multiple users. I'd love an option to allow 1-3 more named users on our account without having to jump to the enterprise level of the product.

review_title: A Flexible Form Platform With Seamless Stripe Integration
description: Overall, my experience with Jotform has been positive. The platform is flexible, easy to configure, and the Stripe integration in particular makes tracking and categorizing revenue straightforward. That said, we have occasionally run into issues where customers submit forms multiple times because the payment status isn’t clear, resulting in duplicate transactions and extra refund handling. If duplicate‑submission protection or clearer payment confirmation improved, it would remove one of the few operational headaches we’ve experienced.
author: Tarrin P.
pros: What I like most about Jotform is how practical and reliable it is for handling payments and submissions in one place. The Stripe integration, in particular, works incredibly smoothly. Once someone submits a form and completes a payment, everything flows directly through Stripe without any extra manual steps. I especially appreciate that each transaction comes through with the description already allocated, which makes it much easier to categorize revenue and keep records organized. From an operational standpoint, that small detail saves a surprising amount of time—no digging through transactions or trying to remember what payment corresponds to which form or event. The descriptions and structure make reconciliation and bookkeeping straightforward. Overall, Jotform strikes a great balance between ease of use and powerful integrations, and the Stripe connection is one of the features that really makes day‑to‑day administration simpler.
cons: One of the things I’ve found challenging with Jotform is how payment submissions occasionally behave when a transaction doesn’t clearly complete for the user. We’ve had situations where a customer submits an order, but because they’re unsure whether the payment processed successfully, they submit the form again. That can result in duplicate transactions being created in Stripe. From the customer’s perspective they’re simply trying to make sure their order went through, but on our end it means we end up with two payments tied to the same submission. The operational downside is that we then have to identify and refund the duplicate charge. While refunds are straightforward to process, the original merchant processing fees are still incurred, which means we lose money on transactions that were never meant to be duplicated in the first place. It adds extra reconciliation work and can create awkward follow‑ups with customers as well. Overall, while Jotform’s flexibility and integrations are strong, improving the clarity of payment status or better preventing accidental duplicate submissions would make a big difference for organizations that rely on forms for event registrations or order processing.

review_title: “Jotform: Helping Me Work Smarter, Not Harder”
description: My overall experience with Jotform has been excellent. It’s very user-friendly, and I love how easy it is to create and customize forms without needing any technical skills. The automation features have saved me so much time, especially in organizing leads and collecting information efficiently. As a busy mom and entrepreneur, I really value tools that help me work smarter, and Jotform does exactly that. Everything runs smoothly—even while I’m offline or asleep, it continues to capture leads and keep my business organized. Overall, Jotform has made my workflow more efficient, less stressful, and a lot more professional.
author: Madelaine R.
pros: Jotform has been such a huge blessing for my business! As a mom of three, I know how important every minute of the day is. Between managing my household, taking care of my kids, and running my business, I don’t always have the luxury of time to manually track leads or handle repetitive tasks. That’s why discovering Jotform has been a total game-changer. With Jotform, I was able to automate my lead generation process and keep everything organized in one place. Instead of worrying about missed inquiries or losing track of potential clients, everything now flows smoothly and efficiently. What I love most is that even while I’m sleeping, Jotform is already working for me—collecting leads, sending notifications, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks. It has saved me countless hours of manual work, given me peace of mind, and allowed me to focus on what matters most—serving my clients and spending quality time with my family. For busy entrepreneurs, especially moms like me who juggle many responsibilities, Jotform is an absolute lifesaver. I can honestly say it has helped me work smarter, not harder.
cons: The main drawback for me is the limited submissions per month on the free plan—it can feel a bit restrictive. Also, some of the programming features for fields aren’t as flexible as I’d like. There’s definitely room for improvement in customization.

review_title: Great for Small Companies to Sell Directly to Customers
description: I think overall once I learned how to use it, it’s actually pretty easy to use. I think it’s great that we’re able to offer lower costs due to having less fees.
author: Marleny R.
pros: It’s very customizable and the cost is lower than most sales platform. Once you learn how to make forms, you can clone previously created forms.
cons: There is learning curve if you’ve never created forms before. Your company may need a little training to allow everyone to use it properly.

review_title: Driving our guest feedback loop in the hospitality industry.
description: Being a Customer Service Lead, I must be able to record guest information and service orders in the shortest time possible and not using a glitchy interface. This is a tool that I utilise in order to operate our online feedback forms and check-in surveys which have greatly decreased manual data input in our front desk team.
author: Patricia G.
pros: The drag-and-drop designer is highly intuitive and it is simple to design sleek and branded forms that could appear stunning on the mobile phone of any guest during their stay.
cons: Those higher submission rates are high to the small business and the offline option is not very reliable with some complex widgets or slow connections.

review_title: My experience
description: I really like it, and in the future I would totally consider to pay for it. My colleagues also like it and even since I showed to them they also have explored jotform.
author: Heidy R.
pros: The customization tools, the creative control we have as users and the multiple widgets that can be added into the form. It’s also easy to understand and use once you get the basics. Even though I wouldnt consider it’s the most intuitive platform. The data collection tool is also very helpful, I’ve used jotform as recollection tool in projects with students and also as evaluation in oral presentations. It has worked perfect.
cons: The limitations on the free account. Even though I understand why. Also I had some trouble in the past trying to configure a formula in one of my forms. I think something useful would be to add instructions on the go.

review_title: Reema’s Views
description: It’s great wish the jotform logo did not come up with the link and a cheaper way to have our own branding
author: reema R.
pros: Ease to set up and collect data, design of form is quite easy to follow. No technical downtime. It’s very accessible
cons: Not able to integrate with gohighlevel, expensive monthly fee and inaccessible for small operators like me to pay annual Difficulty setting up payment

review_title: Jotform Review
description: Jotform has been a reliable and easy-to-use platform that helps streamline our workflows and keep our team organized. It saves us time through automation and makes collecting and managing information simple and consistent.
author: SHANE K.
pros: It’s flexible, reliable, and easy for both our internal team and clients to use. Jotform has been an extremely reliable tool for our operations. We use it daily to streamline submissions, automate workflows, and keep our team organized. The platform is very intuitive, easy to customize, and integrates smoothly with our existing systems. It has saved us a significant amount of time by reducing manual tasks and improving consistency across our processes. Highly recommend for any team looking to scale efficiently.
cons: Jotform branding on the free version Advanced customization and reporting features can feel somewhat limited

review_title: Jotform Simplify Form Building with No Code Form Builder Functionality .
description: Jotform impresses most with it's drag and drop interface ,templates and widgets that are customizable .
author: Sandrine K.
pros: I love Jotform easy to make forms without coding .Offer drag and drop interface feature which makes the process of designing forms fast and easy.Has many templates for different needs and are customizable to match your style .Got strong security features that protect information .
cons: Although Jotform has many great features ,the paid plan is quite higher especially when in need of using it in bigger cases ,

review_title: Couldn't operate my business without it!
description: Overall, it's great. I've been using it for close to 8 years now and literally couldn't operate without the forms.
author: Heather J.
pros: The functionality of the forms. We use it for almost every part of our business - from service agreements, to cleaning supply forms, to QC inspections.
cons: Sometimes, it's not very user friendly. I do wish there would be more explanations on the building parts.

review_title: A powerful form builder.
description: Jotform is very reliable and effective. It has enabled us to efficiently collect data and create more customised forms and surveys.
author: Sekou C.
pros: Effectiveness of the software in data collection and entry. Forms automation capabilities of the software and remote document access and management. The software is fully customizable and easy to use.
cons: I have nothing against Jotform software. It works well especially when creating survey forms. Customer support services of the product are available 24/7.
